description: Claim testnet XION tokens from the faucet

parameters.name: receiver
parameters.description: Receiver address for delegated claims. If provided, uses Delegate message instead of Faucet message. If not provided, claims for authenticated user.

parameters.name: network
parameters.description: Network to use. Faucet is only available on testnet.

validation_rules: Faucet is only available on testnet - claims on mainnet will fail with EFAUCET004
Authentication is required for claim operations - use xion-oauth2 skill first
Receiver must have less than 1 XION balance (balance gate) to receive tokens
24-hour cooldown must have expired since last claim - check with faucet status
Schema validation cannot verify: (1) actual cooldown expiration time, (2) receiver balance, (3) faucet funding status - these are checked by the CLI at runtime
prerequisites: Must be authenticated (use xion-oauth2 skill first)
Receiver must have < 1 XION balance (balance gate)
24-hour cooldown must have expired since last claim
notes: Cooldown: 24 hours (86400 seconds) between claims per address
Receiver must have < 1 XION balance to receive (balance gate)
Faucet is only available on testnet (EFAUCET004 on mainnet)
Use --receiver to claim for another address (Delegate message)
Without --receiver, claims for authenticated user (Faucet message)
AI AGENT NOTE: Always check faucet status first to verify cooldown has expired and balance gate can be satisfied
AI AGENT NOTE: If receiver has >= 1 XION, the claim will fail - instruct user to transfer tokens out first

errors.description: Faucet claim failed (cooldown, balance gate, or insufficient funds)
errors.remediation: Check faucet status with 'xion-toolkit faucet status' and wait for cooldown or reduce balance
Check network connection and faucet contract availability

errors.description: Faucet not available on this network
errors.remediation: Use '--network testnet' or 'xion-toolkit config set-network testnet'
